# Hector Taylor

Canonical site: https://hectortayl.org/

Hector Taylor is a Zurich-based PhD candidate working at the intersection of neuroscience, psychedelic research, virtual reality, embodiment, neuroimaging, and chronic pain.

Relevant links:
- GitHub: https://github.com/Hector-Taylor
- LinkedIn: https://ch.linkedin.com/in/hector-taylor-7999b5161
- UZH/BORL research bio: https://www.borl.uzh.ch/en/News/Welcome-Hector.html
- Alius attendee bio: https://www.aliusresearch.org/attendees.html
